records.formal_signature: existing live_guard fixture
records.conclusion: Live guard has a live token
records.limitation: Bounded to the encoded theorem record and declared assumptions.

records.formal_signature: empty_all_prerequisites positive fixture and all([]) semantics
records.conclusion: Empty all-of prerequisite family is vacuously satisfied
records.limitation: Bounded to the encoded theorem record and declared assumptions.

records.formal_signature: existing DLE rule and fixture
records.conclusion: DLE implies current no-live status
records.limitation: Bounded to the encoded theorem record and declared assumptions.

records.formal_signature: robust_relative_v0 claim and LIVE_RESIDUAL_OBSTRUCTS_ROBUST_RELATIVE_V0
records.conclusion: Live residual obstructs robust relative V0
records.limitation: Bounded to the encoded theorem record and declared assumptions.

records.formal_signature: observer_terminal_self_certificate and TERMINAL_SELF_CERTIFICATE_NOT_EXHAUSTED
records.conclusion: Terminal self-certificate exposes empty internal and external support
records.limitation: Bounded to the encoded theorem record and declared assumptions.

records.formal_signature: existing absolute-relative firewall fixture
records.conclusion: Direct branch-local to absolute promotion violates the firewall
records.limitation: Bounded to the encoded theorem record and declared assumptions.

records.formal_signature: ClosureCertificate(step,seed,closure) and closed candidate imply closure subset candidate.
records.conclusion: Computed closure is the least prerequisite-closed superset.

records.formal_signature: Selected member and live support imply transparent support selection.
records.conclusion: Every accepted one_of obligation records its selected family member.

records.formal_signature: CompatibilityPreserved implies no incompatible pair is jointly live.
records.conclusion: Accepted activation profiles satisfy all enabled compatibility constraints.

records.formal_signature: ProtocolReady implies AllPrerequisitesLive.
records.conclusion: READY_VALUE implies all protocol prerequisites are active.

records.formal_signature: undefinedDomain differs from readyValue(0).
records.conclusion: UNDEFINED_DOMAIN cannot be coerced to a numeric dimension.

records.formal_signature: DomainLicenseExhausted implies WasLive and NoLive.
records.conclusion: Accepted DLE has prior live evidence and current no-license.

records.formal_signature: FreshTokenReactivation(registry,prior,new) implies new.tokenId differs from prior.tokenId.
records.conclusion: Reactivation cannot reuse the historical or retired token identifier.

records.formal_signature: LiveResidual at a declared residual register implies not RawRelativeV0.
records.conclusion: Any live residual blocks raw relative nullity.

records.formal_signature: LiveResidual at a declared non-eliminable residual register implies not RobustRelativeV0NonEliminable.
records.conclusion: A live non-eliminable residual blocks robust relative nullity.

records.formal_signature: Relative claim tier differs from absolute claim tier.
records.conclusion: No FC-1 rule promotes relative V0 to absolute V0.

records.formal_signature: Approximation claim tier differs from identity claim tier.
records.conclusion: Approximation certificates do not entail V0 identity.

records.formal_signature: Equal support and certification states imply terminal-exhaustion inadmissibility.
records.conclusion: Same-state exhausted support cannot certify its own total exhaustion.

records.formal_signature: ArchiveGuardExport(record) and exportsCurrentGuard=false imply archive non-guard export.
assumptions: typed observer, register, context, and archive identifiers
records.conclusion: An archive cannot export a current observer guard.
limitation: archive integrity, access, and provenance remain separate obligations

records.formal_signature: PolicyCompliant and NonCircular and IdentityVerified and EvidenceVerified and nonempty external evidence/independence groups imply ExternalCertificateSupported.
records.conclusion: The independent witness condition is sufficient for the bounded external-certificate predicate.
limitation: sufficiency is conditional on declared policy fields

records.formal_signature: NullMark container and Branch target with ordinary containment mode imply rejection of ordinary containment.
records.conclusion: Ordinary V0-to-branch containment is not licensed.
limitation: typed meta-structural relations are separate from ordinary containment

records.formal_signature: DistinctnessBasis=labelOnly implies failure of label-independent branch distinctness.
records.conclusion: Label difference alone is not an admissible distinctness certificate.
limitation: physical universe distinctness is not claimed

records.formal_signature: NonFiniteKind and CardinalityLicensed imply existence of a meta-index identifier and nonempty proof evidence.
assumptions: meta-index evidence object has type meta_index_certificate
records.conclusion: A non-finite cardinality claim exposes a typed meta-index and proof evidence.
limitation: no physical multiplicity or infinity claim

records.formal_signature: For every finite DiagnosticStatus list, there exists exactly one status equal to primaryStatus(list).
assumptions: finite list over the closed FC-1 status enum
records.conclusion: The primary diagnostic status is total and unique.
limitation: message wording outside canonical templates is not compared

records.formal_signature: WellFormed(x) -> exists! bytes, bytes = SerializeCJ1(x)
records.conclusion: A well-formed object has one canonical V0-OSAP-CJ-1 byte representation.
records.limitation: Hash equality identifies canonical bytes, not semantic truth or provenance truth.

records.formal_signature: WellFormed(x) -> Parse(SerializeCJ1(x)) = x
records.conclusion: Canonical serialize/parse preserves well-formed FC-1 objects.
records.limitation: The theorem covers the accepted JSON-compatible FC-1 representation only.

records.formal_signature: Pinned(proof,registry,ruleset) -> Replay1 = Replay2
records.conclusion: Pinned proof, registry, and ruleset produce one canonical replay result.
records.limitation: Determinism is conditional on fully pinned inputs and absence of hidden state.

records.formal_signature: VersionChanged -> not ParserCoercion and exists MigrationRecord
records.conclusion: A semantic-version change cannot be hidden as parser coercion.
records.limitation: The audit establishes migration visibility, not automatic semantic compatibility.

records.formal_signature: Mapped(T) -> HashLean(T) = HashCanonical(T) = HashCoq(T)
records.conclusion: Mapped Lean and Coq theorem entries share a canonical statement hash.
records.limitation: Statement-hash correspondence does not imply proof-term identity.

records.formal_signature: RuleLemmas and Invariants and Check(x)=PASS -> FC1Obligations(x)
records.conclusion: Conditional on proved rule lemmas, checker PASS implies the FC-1 semantic obligations hold.
records.limitation: This is a conditional accepted-fragment theorem, not checker completeness or full-theory soundness.

records.formal_signature: ExtensionTarget(t) -> BaseCeiling=150 and ExtensionRecord(t) and Namespace(t)
records.conclusion: Every theorem target beyond the normative v1.1 ceiling is introduced by an explicit, namespaced extension record.
records.limitation: This establishes repository-local provenance for the T151-T156 development extension; it does not retroactively amend the normative v1.1 document.

records.formal_signature: ObservedKinds(input) subset DeclaredKinds(extension)
records.conclusion: Every observed extension claim kind belongs to the declared Phase 6 claim vocabulary.
records.limitation: Vocabulary closure is bounded to the audited claim-kind lists and is not a completeness claim for all future extensions.

records.formal_signature: Pinned(input,ruleset) -> Hash(Diagnostics1)=Hash(Diagnostics2)
records.conclusion: Repeated diagnostic evaluation under pinned inputs yields one canonical diagnostic envelope.
records.limitation: Determinism is conditional on pinned inputs, canonical serialization, and absence of hidden state.

records.formal_signature: FinitePath(p) and Nodup(p) -> AcyclicEvidenceProvenance(p)
records.conclusion: A finite evidence-provenance path with pairwise distinct evidence identifiers contains no cycle.
records.limitation: The executable rule checks explicit finite paths; it does not infer omitted provenance edges.

records.formal_signature: CurrentTuple(schema,language,checker,semantics)=ExpectedLockTuple
records.conclusion: The active schema, language, checker, and semantic versions match the declared compatibility lock.
records.limitation: Tuple equality records compatibility intent; it does not prove semantic equivalence across arbitrary versions.

records.formal_signature: BaselineOnly(x) and Isolated(E) and not Override(E) -> ResultBase(x)=ResultExtended(x)
records.conclusion: Under explicit isolation premises, Phase 6 extension handlers do not change the canonical result for baseline-only inputs.
records.limitation: The theorem is conditional on handler isolation and no baseline override; it is not a global conservativity theorem for arbitrary code changes.
